stories.title: AUSL Final Stretch — Three Days to No. 1 Seed
stories.angle: Saturday is the game. Utah vs Chicago, No. 1 seed on the line, with the ABC debut of professional softball eight days away. Frame this as the stretch run everyone has been waiting for.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Utah leads Chicago by 1 game with 3 left — and Saturday's Talons at Bandits (4 PM ET, ESPN2) is the game.

No. 1 seed = direct bye to the ABC Championship.
No. 2 seed = must win a play-in first.

The stretch run is here. 🥎

#AUSL

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
AUSL standings entering the final 3 games:

Utah Talons — 14-6 ✅ (clinched)
Chicago Bandits — 14-7
Portland Cascade — chasing

Saturday 4 PM ET on ESPN2: Talons at Bandits.

No. 1 seed = ABC debut. Big game. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: AUSL Final Week: Utah and Chicago Are Playing for the No. 1 Seed — and Saturday Is the Game

research.facts:
AUSL Final Stretch — No. 1 Seed Race
**Confirmed facts (HIGH confidence — multiple sources):**
- Utah Talons clinched AUSL postseason berth; entering July 17 at approximately 14-6 record
- Chicago Bandits defeated Carolina Blaze 15-7 on July 16, 2026; Bandits record approximately 14-7
- AUSL regular season ends July 20, 2026
- Saturday July 18: Talons at Bandits, 4 PM ET, ESPN2 — key matchup for No. 1 seed
- No. 1 seed earns direct bye to AUSL Championship Series
- Nos. 2 and 3 seeds play single-elimination play-in game July 23 at Davis Diamond, College Station TX
- AUSL Championship Series: July 25-27, Davis Diamond, Texas A&M campus, College Station TX
- Game 1 of Championship to air on ABC — first professional softball game ever on network television
research.sources:
- Source: theausl.com/news/2026-ausl-championship-texas-am-davis-diamond-college-station/, ESPN AUSL schedule
**MEDIUM confidence:**
- Chicago's 9-game winning streak was snapped by Portland before July 16
- Portland Cascade approximately 11-9 heading into final week
- Oklahoma City Spark won a series against Utah late in the week (from power rankings)
- Sami Williams and Morgan Zerkle are offensive contributors for Chicago Bandits
**Context from prior pipeline runs:**
- Utah Talons head coach reference; Autumn Faraimo threw complete game 10K on July 16 vs OKC
- Allchin HR and Palacios 2-run blast in Talons' July 16 win over OKC (5-4)

stories.title: Volts at Cascade Tonight — NiJaree Canady's Playoff Last Stand
stories.angle: The question isn't just whether the Volts win tonight — it's whether Canady is turning a corner. If her mechanics have clicked, this is the game where you'd see it.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Tonight: Texas Volts at Portland Cascade, 8 PM ET on ESPN2.

NiJaree Canady is 0-3 with a 6.87 ERA in her pro debut. The Volts are outside the playoff picture.

If the mechanics Tori Nyberg has been fixing are back — tonight's the night you'd see it. #AUSL

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Volts-Cascade is live right now on ESPN2. #AUSL

NiJaree Canady took the mound tonight with the Volts' playoff hopes on the line.

Watch and follow for updates. 🥎 #softball

article.headline: NiJaree Canady Takes the Mound Tonight — and the Volts' Playoff Hopes Go With Her

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Volts at Cascade Tonight — NiJaree Canady's Playoff Last Stand

**Image 2.1 — Social (1080x1350)**
- Type: imagn
- Subject: NiJaree Canady pitching
- Search term: "NiJaree Canady Texas Volts"
- Caption overlay: "TONIGHT / VOLTS AT CASCADE / 8PM ET ESPN2"
- Status: not_started

---

research.facts:
NiJaree Canady / Volts at Cascade Tonight
**Confirmed facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Texas Volts at Portland Cascade, July 17, 8 PM ET, ESPN2
- NiJaree Canady: 0-3 record, 6.87 ERA in 2026 AUSL appearances (confirmed from multiple sources including si.com, theausl.com)
- Canady was picked No. 2 overall in 2026 AUSL College Draft (May 4, 2026)
- Signed with Texas Volts on June 12, 2026
- Tori Nyberg (former Stanford pitching coach) called in to address mechanics
- Mechanical issue: shifted from "squared up" to "open" stance post-injury at Texas Tech
- Canady did earn first AUSL win July 10 (complete game, 6 Ks) — one win does not close the story
research.sources:
- Source: si.com, theausl.com player page
**MEDIUM confidence:**
- Volts currently outside playoff picture (standings not fully confirmed post July 16)
- Other pitchers on Volts: Rachel Garcia (MLBx MVP), Ally Carda, Alyssa Denham
**LOW — do not use:**
- Exact Volts record as of July 17 (need confirmation after July 16 games)

stories.title: PGF Nationals Opens Saturday — 48 Hours Out
stories.angle: Two days out. Rosters are locked. The biggest girls' softball tournament of the summer begins Saturday, and the class of 2028 college recruiting window is 45 days away.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
PGF Nationals starts Saturday at Great Park in Irvine, CA — 48 hours away.

18U and 16U divisions, July 19-25. The biggest girls' fastpitch tournament of the summer.

September 1 recruiting window is 45 days out. Every at-bat counts. #PGFNationals #softball

article.headline: PGF Nationals Opens in 48 Hours — Here's What to Know Before Saturday

image_concepts.label: Image

research.facts:
PGF Nationals Opens Saturday
**Confirmed facts (HIGH confidence):**
- PGF National Championships: July 19 – August 4, 2026
- Location: Great Park, Irvine, California
- Week 1: 18U and 16U divisions, July 19-25
- Week 2: 14U, 12U, 10U divisions, July 26–August 2
research.sources:
- Source: pgfnationals.com (official site), flosoftball.com
**HIGH confidence:**
- September 1 = Class of 2028 college recruiting contact window opens
- July 17 to September 1 = 45 days
**MEDIUM confidence:**
- Arizona Storm Appel enters as top 18U contender (from prior pipeline tracking)
- Roster freeze passed July 13 at 11:59 PM PST (confirmed from July 13 pipeline)

stories.title: Megan Grant and the Cascade Fight for No. 2 Seed
stories.angle: Grant made the ESPY ballot because of what she did in college. Now she's trying to win something that matters in the pro game — and the difference between second and third is real.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Megan Grant broke the all-time NCAA home run record (42) this spring.

Now she's leading the AUSL in HRs — and the Portland Cascade are fighting for the No. 2 seed with 3 games left.

The difference between 2nd and 3rd is real. #AUSL #softball

article.headline: Megan Grant Is Still Making History — and the Portland Cascade Are Chasing a No. 2 Seed

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
Megan Grant / Portland Cascade

**Image 4.1 — Social (1080x1350)**
- Type: imagn
- Subject: Megan Grant batting or celebrating
- Search term: "Megan Grant Portland Cascade"
- Caption overlay: "MEGAN GRANT / AUSL HR LEADER / FIGHTING FOR NO. 2 SEED"
- Status: not_started

---

research.facts:
Megan Grant / Portland Cascade
**Confirmed facts (HIGH confidence):**
- Megan Grant set all-time NCAA home run record: 42 HR in 2026 season (UCLA)
- Previous record: Laura Espinoza, 37 HR (Arizona, 1995) — 31-year-old mark
- Grant nominated for ESPY Award for Best Record-Breaking Performance
- Myles Garrett (NFL, LA Rams) won the ESPY for Best Record-Breaking Performance
- Portland Cascade was AUSL 4th pick (Grant); first-week 313-ft AUSL HR record
- Grant leads AUSL in home runs (from July 16 pipeline)
research.sources:
- Source: ESPN ESPYs coverage, si.com, theausl.com
**MEDIUM confidence:**
- Portland Cascade approximately 11-9 record entering final week

stories.title: AUSL Championship in 8 Days — What You Need to Know
stories.angle: Fans coming to professional softball for the first time need a roadmap. Eight days out, with three regular-season games left, this is the moment to explain exactly what's on the line.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
AUSL Championship is 8 days away. Here's how it works:

📍 Davis Diamond, Texas A&M, College Station TX
📅 Play-in game: July 23 (No. 2 vs No. 3 seed)
🏆 Championship: July 25-27

Game 1 on ABC. First professional softball game ever on network TV. #AUSL

article.headline: AUSL Championship Is 8 Days Away — Here's How the Postseason Works

research.facts:
AUSL Championship Format
**Confirmed facts (HIGH confidence):**
- AUSL Championship Series: July 25-27, Davis Diamond, College Station TX (Texas A&M campus)
- Play-in game: July 23, Davis Diamond (Nos. 2 and 3 seeds, single elimination)
- Format: best-of-three Championship Series
- Game 1 on ABC — first professional softball game on network television
research.sources:
- Source: theausl.com/news/2026-ausl-championship-texas-am-davis-diamond-college-station/
- Postseason begins July 23 (play-in), regular season ends July 20
